component.name: LilDisc
component.summary: Tiny native Discord app for Linux

description.p: LilDisc is a third-party Discord client designed for a smooth, native experience on Linux desktops.
Built with GTK4 and libadwaita for a modern look and feel, it delivers a lightweight and visually appealing Discord app that integrates with Wayland desktops.
LilDisc prioritizes simplicity and speed over feature parity with the official client. Highlights:

ul.li: Text chat with complete Markdown and custom emoji support
Guild folders, channel categories, and a tabbed chat interface
Quick switcher for channels and servers
Image, video, and file uploads with previews and downloads
Inline GIF/video playback and rich embeds
Resizable sidebar with optional compact avatar-only mode
Presence indicators, system tray, and message search

description.p: It does not aim to support voice chat, which is best handled by other clients.
